name: Ukuphucula ukwahlulahlula
description: Immobilize iifractures usebenzisa izinto ezikhoyo zokuthintela ukulimala ngakumbi, ukunciphisa iintlungu, kunye nokunciphisa ukulahleka kwegazi kwizicubu ezijikelezileyo. I-Splint ikwindawo efunyenweyo ngaphandle kokuba ukujikeleza kuphazamisekile -- ke yolula ngobunono.
equipment: Iimagazini eziqengqelekayo, iintonga, iipali zeentente (intsimi ephuculweyo)
steps: Veza kwaye uvavanye ukwenzakala - khangela ukujikeleza, ukuva, ukunyakaza (CSM) kude ukuya kuphuka ngaphambi nangemva.
Lawula nakuphi na ukopha okusebenzayo phambi kokuqhekeka.
I-Pad bony ibalaselisa ngesisa ukukhusela izilonda zoxinzelelo.
Khetha imathiriyeli eqhiwukileyo ixesha elide ngokwaneleyo ukuba lingashukumi isidibaniselwano esingasentla NAngaphantsi kokwaphuka.
Isikhundla selungu kwindawo yokuthuthuzela okanye ulungelelwaniso lwe-anatomical-unganyanzelisi.
Faka i-padding, emva koko udibanise imathiriyeli. Khusela nge-bandages okanye imicu yelaphu.
UNGAWUQINISEKISI -- shiya iincam zeminwe/iinzwane ziveziwe ukuze ujonge i-CSM.
Phinda uvavanye i-CSM emva kokufakwa kwesicelo -- khulula ngoko nangoko ukuba ujikelezo aluphazamisi.
Phakamisa imilenze ukuba kunokwenzeka ukunciphisa ukudumba.
warnings: Phinda uhlole i-CSM rhoqo ngemizuzu eyi-15 ukuya kwengama-30 -- ukudumba kunokwenza i-splint echanekileyo ibe yi-tourniquet.
Vula iifractures: vala inxeba ngesinxibo esingenazintsholongwane kuqala, emva koko uqhawuke. UNGAWUtyhala ithambo emva.
I-Femur fractures inokulahlekelwa yi-1-2L yegazi kwithanga-- phatha ngokukrakra ngenxa yokothuka.
Umrhanelwa orhanelwayo wophuka: SUKUPHUHLISA i-splint --nciphisa intshukumo, gcina uzinzo olungaphakathi.

pediatric.note: Iipleyiti zokukhula ebantwaneni zibuthathaka kuneligaments--umrhanelwa ukwaphuka nokuba kuncinci. I-Torus (i-buckle) i-fractures ingaba nokudumba okuncinci.

obstetric.note: Ukwahlukaniswa okusemgangathweni kuyasebenza. Kuphephe ukuma ixesha elide entla -- ukuthambeka kwecala lasekhohlo ukuba ilele ithe tyaba.

source: JTS CPG: Orthopaedic Trauma / PHTLS / TCCC
